attributes.description: Alerts when InnoDB row lock waits exceed 100 in 15 minutes. Indicates application-level contention.
attributes.name: [MySQL OTel] High row lock contention

investigation_guide.blob:
## MySQL high row lock contention

### What fired
`INCREASE(mysql.row_locks)` with `kind=waits` exceeded 100 during the window.

### Why it matters
Row lock waits mean transactions are serialising on the same rows. Heavy waits cause latency and possible deadlocks.

### Triage
1. Identify the hot rows / indexes.
2. Inspect slow queries causing long transactions.

### Remediation
- Shorten transactions.
- Adjust isolation / access order.

### Tuning
- 100 threshold; tune to workload.

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-mysqlreceiver.otel-*
// Row lock waits are a monotonic counter; use INCREASE for delta over the time window
| WHERE metrics.mysql.row_locks IS NOT NULL
    AND attributes.kind == "waits"
| STATS increase = SUM(INCREASE(metrics.mysql.row_locks))
  BY resource.attributes.mysql.instance.endpoint
// Alert when more than 100 lock waits in the window; tune based on workload
| WHERE increase > 100
| SORT increase DESC
